4sight v3 — Financial Data Analysis Report

Run ID: run_20260515_160259 | Generated: 2026-05-15T17:14:50.050300 | Tables: 6 | Columns: 207

Executive Summary

The analysis reveals several key findings, including the dominant 'CM2026000065' in categorical analysis of 'tran_ref_no' and the up trend in datetime analysis of 'cheque_date'. However, the analysis also detects several risk signals, including the dominant 'N/A' in categorical analysis of 'actionplan', 'duedate', 'recommendation', 'responsible', 'severity', 'remarks', 'assignment', 'company', 'business_process', 'owner', 'actionstatus'. To address these issues, we recommend investigating the cause of the dominant 'N/A' values and improving data quality. Additionally, we suggest analyzing the trend of 'cheque_date' and 'po_date' to identify areas for improvement.

40/100

Data Quality Score

Key Findings

  • Categorical analysis of 'tran_ref_no' shows unique=1, dominant='CM2026000065'
  • Categorical analysis of 'created_by' shows unique=1, dominant='Arshitha'
  • Categorical analysis of 'name_of_observation' shows unique=1, dominant='Cheque Clearing'
  • Datetime analysis of 'cheque_date' shows trend=up, range=29 days
  • Datetime analysis of 'po_date' in foresight_missing_grn_67222 shows trend=up, range=8401 days

Risk Signals

  • Dominant 'N/A' in categorical analysis of 'actionplan', 'duedate', 'recommendation', 'responsible', 'severity', 'remarks', 'assignment', 'company', 'business_process', 'owner', 'actionstatus'
  • Unique=0 in categorical analysis of 'actionplan', 'duedate', 'recommendation', 'responsible', 'severity', 'remarks', 'assignment', 'company', 'business_process', 'owner', 'actionstatus'
  • Datetime analysis of 'date' in foresight_cheque_clearing_67318 shows trend=unknown, range=0 days
  • Datetime analysis of 'cperiod' in foresight_cheque_clearing_67318 shows trend=unknown, range=0 days
  • Datetime analysis of 'date' in foresight_price_variance_67227 shows trend=unknown, range=0 days

Recommendations

  • Investigate the cause of the dominant 'N/A' in categorical analysis of 'actionplan', 'duedate', 'recommendation', 'responsible', 'severity', 'remarks', 'assignment', 'company', 'business_process', 'owner', 'actionstatus'
  • Improve data quality by reducing the number of 'N/A' values in categorical analysis
  • Analyze the trend of 'cheque_date' and consider implementing measures to reduce the range
  • Analyze the trend of 'po_date' in foresight_missing_grn_67222 and consider implementing measures to reduce the range
  • Investigate the cause of the unknown trend in datetime analysis of 'date' in foresight_cheque_clearing_67318, 'cperiod' in foresight_cheque_clearing_67318, and 'date' in foresight_price_variance_67227
